spanish: Las conversaciones entre Irán y Estados Unidos están en problemas después del enfrentamiento naval cerca del estrecho de Ormuz.
english: Conversations between Iran and the United States are in trouble after the naval confrontation near the Strait of Hormuz.
explanation: Uses 'estar en problemas' (to be in trouble) - an idiomatic expression, and complex prepositional phrases

spanish: Los expertos afirman que crecerá más del 7% este año.
english: Experts state that it will grow more than 7% this year.
explanation: Future tense (crecerá) in a subordinate clause after 'afirman que' - using future for predictions

spanish: Esto ocurre incluso con los nuevos impuestos de Estados Unidos y otros problemas globales.
english: This is happening even with the new U.S. taxes and other global problems.
explanation: Present progressive (está ocurriendo implied) with complex prepositional phrase 'incluso con' (even with)
